zh.lifeSummary: 當William Hurlbut於1689年3月29日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德時，他的父親Cornelius Hurlbut36歲，母親Rebecca Butler25歲。他於1717年4月17日與Susannah Bowen在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1760年3月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加新泽西莫里斯門達哈姆享年70歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Hurlbut于1689年3月29日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德时，他的父亲Cornelius Hurlbut36岁，母亲Rebecca Butler25岁。他于1717年4月17日与Susannah Bowen在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1760年3月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加新泽西莫里斯門達哈姆享年70岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州。

nameMeanings.name: Hurlbut
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from a medieval game called hurlebatte, which took its name from ‘short battes of a cubit long and a halfe, with pykes of yron, and were tied to a line, that when they were throwne, one might plucke them again’ (1565–73). Compare ‘Pleying at The two hande swerd, at swerd and bokelere, and at two pyked staf, at The hurlebatte’ (about 1450 in MED).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries 1739: Morris, New Jersey Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Morris, New Jersey, United States

en.lifeSummary: When William Hurlbut was born on 29 March 1689, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Cornelius Hurlbut, was 36 and his mother, Rebecca Butler, was 25. He married Susannah Bowen on 17 April 1717, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 24 March 1760, in Mendham, Morris, New Jersey, British Colonial America, at the age of 70, and was buried in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Hurlbut est né le 29 mars 1689, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Cornelius Hurlbut, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Rebecca Butler, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Susannah Bowen le 17 avril 1717, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 24 mars 1760, à Mendham, Morris, New Jersey, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Hurlbut am 29. März 1689 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cornelius Hurlbut 36 und seine Mutter Rebecca Butler 25. Er hat am 17. April 1717 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten Susannah Bowen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 24. März 1760 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Mendham, Morris, New Jersey, British Colonial America und wurde in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Hurlbut è nato il il 29 marzo 1689 nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Cornelius Hurlbut, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Rebecca Butler, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Susannah Bowen il 17 aprile 1717, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 24 marzo 1760, nel Mendham, Morris, New Jersey, British Colonial America, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: William Hurlbutが1689年3月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで生まれた時，父Cornelius Hurlbutは36歳，母Rebecca Butlerは25歳であった。1717年4月17日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでSusannah Bowenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1760年3月24日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュージャージー州モリスメンドハムで70歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州にて埋葬された。

ko.Wethersfield Hartford, Connecticut, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드

ko.Mendham, Morris, New Jersey, British Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴저지 주 모리스 멘드함
ko.lifeSummary: William Hurlbut(이)가 1689년 3월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cornelius Hurlbut(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Rebecca Butler(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1717년 4월 17일 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 Susannah Bowen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1760년 3월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴저지 주 모리스 멘드함에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Hurlbut nasceu em 29 de março de 1689, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Cornelius Hurlbut, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Rebecca Butler, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Susannah Bowen em 17 de abril de 1717, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de março de 1760, em Mendham, Morris, New Jersey, British Colonial America, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Hurlbut родился 29 марта 1689 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Cornelius Hurlbut было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Rebecca Butler, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Susannah Bowen 17 апреля 1717 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 24 марта 1760 г. в местности мендхам, моррис, Нью-Джерси, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Hurlbut nació el 29 de marzo de 1689, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Cornelius Hurlbut, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Rebecca Butler, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Susannah Bowen el 17 de abril de 1717, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 24 de marzo de 1760, en Mendham, Morris, New Jersey, British Colonial America, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
